title: hemitelia boryana
intro: Hemitelia boryana, also known as the Bory's scale fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Hemiteliaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. Hemitelia boryana has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Hemitelia boryana can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
